name: MX Technologies Open Finance REST API
what_it_does: MX Technologies open finance REST API for banks, credit unions, fintechs, and digital banking platforms to access financial account aggregation, transaction data enhancement and cleansing, income verification, financial wellness insights, and account ownership verification — enabling automated financial data connectivity, spending categorization, budget analytics, and personalized financial guidance through MX's financial data platform connecting to 16,000+ financial institutions. Enables AI agents to manage account aggregation for consumer financial account connection automation, handle transaction enhancement for merchant name cleansing and category tagging automation, access financial insights for spending pattern and budget analytics automation, retrieve income analysis for income stream identification and verification automation, manage member for financial institution customer relationship data automation, handle connection for financial institution account linking automation, access account verification for micro-deposit alternative and ownership verification automation, retrieve net worth for total financial picture calculation automation, manage widgets for financial UI component embedding automation, and integrate MX with core banking, mobile banking, and financial wellness apps for open finance automation.
use_cases: Aggregating consumer bank accounts for personal financial management app automation agents
Enhancing transaction data with merchant names and categories for financial analytics automation agents
Verifying consumer income from bank data for lending decisioning automation agents
Building financial wellness insights and budgeting tools for digital banking platform automation agents
not_for: Payment initiation (MX is data aggregation and analytics, not payment processing or transfer initiation)
Crypto asset aggregation (MX focuses on traditional banking and financial accounts, not crypto wallets)
Business financial analytics (MX primarily serves consumer financial data, not corporate analytics)
best_when: A bank, credit union, fintech, or digital banking platform wanting AI agents to aggregate consumer financial data, enhance transaction clarity, analyze spending patterns, verify income, and deliver personalized financial wellness insights through MX's open finance data platform.
avoid_when: FI PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: MX data access requires financial institution or fintech partnership agreement; automated open consumer access assumption creates partner_required; automated must establish MX partnership before data access. CONSUMER CONSENT IS MANDATORY: MX requires consumer authorization for data aggregation; automated no-consent assumption creates consent_required; automated must implement MX consumer authorization flow. DATA AGGREGATION HAS FI-QUALITY VARIATION: MX connection quality varies by financial institution (screen-scrape vs. API); automated uniform data quality assumption creates data_quality_variation for institutions without direct API; automated must handle varying data freshness across FI connection types. TRANSACTION CLEANSING IS PROBABILISTIC: MX transaction enhancement uses ML categorization; automated perfect categorization assumption creates miscategorized_transactions for unusual or ambiguous transactions; automated must handle and review MX categorization for accuracy.

auth.notes: MX uses API key + Basic Auth for open finance REST API. REST API with JSON. Lehi, UT HQ. Founded 2010 by Ryan Caldwell. Products: Aggregation, Data Enhancement, Financial Insights, Income Verification, Account Verification, Financial Strength. 16,000+ FI connections. 600M+ transactions/month. $300M+ raised. Competes with Plaid, Finicity (Mastercard), and Yodlee for financial data aggregation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for qualified partners; production requires MX partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-connection and per-API-call pricing; data products and widget pricing; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Lehi UT. $300M raised. Per-connection pricing. 16,000+ FI connections. Open finance platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; aggregation and enhancement APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: MEMBER CONTEXT IS REQUIRED: MX API calls require member context (MX member GUID); automated user-agnostic assumption creates missing_member_context; automated must create and maintain MX member records linked to each consumer

AGGREGATION IS TRIGGERED, NOT AUTOMATIC: MX account aggregation must be explicitly triggered; automated always-fresh assumption creates stale_account_data without manual or scheduled aggregation trigger; automated must implement aggregation refresh strategy

TRANSACTION ENHANCEMENT IS POST-AGGREGATION: MX transaction cleansing and categorization runs after aggregation; automated instant categorization assumption creates raw_transaction_data before enhancement runs; automated must wait for MX enhancement processing

WIDGET IS PREFERRED FOR CONSUMER FLOWS: MX provides pre-built widgets for consumer authorization; automated custom-built auth assumption creates compliance_risk for custom-built aggregation flows; automated should use MX Connect widget for consumer account linking

INCOME ANALYSIS IS BASED ON TRANSACTION HISTORY: MX income verification uses bank transaction history; automated instant income verification assumption creates insufficient_history for accounts with limited transaction history; automated must ensure adequate transaction history for income analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: Open finance. GLBA, FCRA, SOC2. API key. US. Consumer financial account and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial data. GLBA, FCRA, SOC2. API key. US. Consumer bank account and transaction data.
